name: Awaria Girls
description:
All the girls are here! Zmora, Striga, Cutwire, Nikita, Ula, and Yaga! Get ready for a crazy rush filled with ghosts and sugar!

You choose your role! Tunnel Runner, Ghost, Scientist, Harem Builder, Robot, Or whatever you can think of!

Fight them, smooch them, fight and smooch them, build a harem, give them therapy, it’s all up to you!

Characters from Awaria by Vanripper. We love you Vanripper!

10 Intros

  1. Standard.

  2. Zmora sees her past

  3. Ula’s sweet Love

  4. Cutwire 2’s Yandere love

  5. Cutwire 1 needs help making up with 2

  6. Nikita hot as hell mommy time

  7. Yaga’s broken dream.

  8. Training exercise goes insane! (Everyone)

  9. The ghost territory dispute. (Everyone)

  10. Open scenario, you choose!
creator: Tevin Anarchy
